scored_codes.term: Asymptomatic occlusion of intracranial vertebral artery (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Asymptomatic occlusion of intracranial vertebral artery may represent a stroke risk factor or subclinical finding rather than a symptomatic stroke event.
scored_codes.usage_source: NHS Digital primary care SNOMED reporting

scored_codes.term: History of cerebrovascular accident due to ischemia (situation)
scored_codes.rationale: History of cerebrovascular accident is a past event (situation), not an active instance of primary stroke.
scored_codes.usage_source: NHS Digital primary care SNOMED reporting

scored_codes.term: Stroke/transient ischemic attack monitoring first letter (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative/monitoring code (first letter of monitoring protocol) that does not confirm the patient has stroke; it is a process-of-care code.
scored_codes.usage_source: NHS Digital primary care SNOMED reporting

scored_codes.term: Stroke/transient ischemic attack monitoring second letter (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative/monitoring code (second letter of monitoring protocol) that does not confirm the patient has stroke; it is a process-of-care code.
scored_codes.usage_source: NHS Digital primary care SNOMED reporting

scored_codes.term: Stroke/transient ischemic attack monitoring third letter (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative/monitoring code (third letter of monitoring protocol) that does not confirm the patient has stroke; it is a process-of-care code.
scored_codes.usage_source: NHS Digital primary care SNOMED reporting

scored_codes.term: Fetal epilepsy due to perinatal stroke (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Fetal epilepsy due to perinatal stroke is a complication/sequela of perinatal stroke, not an instance of stroke itself.
scored_codes.usage_source: NHS Digital primary care SNOMED reporting
